reviews.comment:
Quise ingresar al baño y no había ni un playero, que me atendiera, nada.

(Translated by Google)
I wanted to go into the bathroom and there wasn't a single beach attendant to help me, nothing.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11189743280620158761/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHb095MDNBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, rapidez y calidad en combustible.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, fast and quality fuel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11189743280620158761/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHN2NXbk1REAE

reviews.comment:
Todos los servicios, opción para desayunar. Nos ayudaron muy amablemente con una goma pinchada de nuestro auto, inflandola para llegar a una gomeria.muy recomendable

(Translated by Google)
All services included, including breakfast. They very kindly helped us with a flat tire on our car, inflating it so we could get to a tire shop. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11189743280620158761/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHemVQbkdBEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención en surtidores. Toda la paciencia para pagar con la aplicación de YPF y obtener descuentos.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service at the pumps. They were very patient when paying with the YPF app and getting discounts.

reviews.comment:
El servicio suele ser impecable. Pero la última vez que estuve en el Servicompras, la empleada no era muy amable y las medialunas estaban quemadas.
Cuando remarqué eso, con poca onda me contestó ESTÁN TODAS ASÍ

(Translated by Google)
The service is usually impeccable. But the last time I was at Servicompras, the employee wasn't very friendly and the croissants were burnt.
When I pointed this out, she rudely replied, "They're all like that."
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11189743280620158761/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHMEotdmV3EAE

reviews.comment:
Soy cliente fijo del lugar, como será  que de Juana Koslay voy a cargar combustible a esa estación. Muy buena atención del personal de playa.

(Translated by Google)
I'm a regular customer there; I even go to fill up at that station from Juana Koslay. The service from the pump staff is excellent.
